content.en:
Ye Tian also knew very well that there were many peak ancient demon-level powerhouses in the Realm of Destruction, maybe those peaking ancient demon-level powerhouses would not deal with him, but if they encountered treasures, they would definitely not give them to him.

Therefore, he wants to snatch too many resources from here, I am afraid it is unrealistic.

He could only take the opportunity to obtain some resources that other peak ancient demon-level powerhouses had not found, and of course, if he encountered some weaker peak-level ancient demon-level powerhouses, he was not afraid at all.

Although he hadn't fought against a true peak Ancient Demon-level powerhouse yet, with his strength, there shouldn't be any big problems.

Soon.

Ye Tian found a resource.

【Grass of Destruction】

This is one of the more common resources in the Realm of Destruction, and it is also the easiest resource to find, but it is not low.

The Grass of Destruction can be swallowed directly, enhancing the body of the ancient demon-level powerhouse, and if the Grass of Destruction swallows countless plants in the "Six-Eighty-Three" theory, it can even be trained into a special body of the Ancient Demon - the body of the Friction!

Moreover, this kind of Friction Body does not affect its own ultimate body structure, it is an additional kind of physique.

The Body of Destruction has extremely terrifying combat power, and many pinnacle ultimate arcane arts will be amplified by the Body of Destruction.

However, among the main department of the Arrow Mother, there was only one peak ancient demon-level powerhouse who had cultivated the body of Friction, and he still used the endless years to continuously acquire other peaking ancient demon-level powerhouses and worked hard to collect them, so that he finally gathered enough Friction Grass.

Now, there are still several peak ancient demon-level powerhouses in the main department of the Arrow Mother who are buying the Grass of Destruction, and the reward given is not low.

Therefore, many peak Ancient Demon-level powerhouses or top-level Ancient Demon-level powerhouses will collect Friction Grass, and they can sell it if they don't need it, so they don't have to worry about no Ancient Demon-level powerhouses to buy it.

Ye Tian directly picked this Killing Grass, and then continued to look for other resource treasures.

On the other side, the Golden Slayer Ancient Demon was looking for Ye Tian's traces, and he was not obsessed with finding resources.

For him, killing Ye Tiancai was the most important thing, if Ye Tian was allowed to get out alive, he would have no chance to attack and kill Ye Tian.

With his realm of being a peak Ancient Demon-level powerhouse, it was not difficult to find Ye Tian in the Realm of Mortality.

Immediately, he cast an ultimate arcane technique of tracking to lock Ye Tian's position.

"There is no such area!"

He traveled away and went to another area to look for it.

And at this moment, Ye Tian didn't know that the Golden Extermination Ancient Demon was coming to assassinate him, in fact, even if he knew, he wouldn't have any worries, after all, the Golden Exterminating Ancient Demon was just an ordinary peak Ancient Demon level powerhouse, and he was not as powerful as Proz.

After another period of time, Ye Tian found a few more Killing Grasses, as well as a few resources, although the number was not much, but each resource was extremely precious.

For example, a resource called Liuli Colorful Red Fruit, this resource can quickly improve the cultivation of ancient demon-level powerhouses, and its value is extremely high, and it is difficult for the outside world to find this kind of resource.

......

"There is a strong man who locks my place!"

Ye Tian stopped and frowned slightly.

In an instant, a figure came across many territories, and its terrifying aura made the area tremble.

The countless ultimate particles between heaven and earth were crushed and turned into the opponent's ultimate rule realm.

It was the ultimate rule realm of the Perfection Realm, as if this territory was truly under his control.

"Heavenly Ancient Demon, I've found you!!"

The Golden Slayer Ancient Demon said with a smile.

Moreover, with a movement in his mind, an ultimate ancient treasure shone in all directions, blocking this area and making it impossible for the battle in this area to be transmitted.

This is also to prevent other peak ancient demon-level powerhouses from perceiving this and thus destroying his attack.

If he let other peak Ancient Demon-level powerhouses ruin his attack and kill plan, then it would be too late for him to regret it.

So, he must be ready for everything!

......

"Golden Slayer Ancient Demon, what do you want to do?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Hahaha, naturally I want to kill you, you are too wicked, if you live, I will always be afraid. You have a great hatred with our Golden God Ministry, and I don't worry that you will let the Golden God Department go. Ploz has little hope of moving forward, and you're different, and if you grow up, I'm definitely not your match. "Golden Destroying Ancient Demon Dao.

Ye Tian didn't panic at all, and said with a smile: "Is it difficult, do you think you can kill me now?"

"Of course, I am a peak Ancient Demon level powerhouse, you have only broken through to the top Ancient Demon level realm, and this is the realm of Friction Killing, and it will not suppress the strength, do you think I can kill you?"

"Hehe, just an ordinary peak ancient demon-level powerhouse, you also want to kill me, you are too confident in yourself. Ye Tian sneered.

The Golden Slayer Ancient Demon was too lazy to talk nonsense, so he did it directly.

The Fifth Form's Secret Form, as well as the Peak Ultimate Arcane, were cast one by one, and then combined with the Ultimate Rule Realm of the Perfection Realm.

Moreover, there are also top-notch ultimate ancient treasures on his body, increasing his combat power.

Ye Tian also had a thought, several forms of secret methods erupted, five ultimate rule realms erupted, and all kinds of peak ultimate arcane techniques were also urged.

Thundered!!!!

Ye Tian and the Golden Slayer Ancient Demon collided together in an instant, and with just one blow, Ye Tian retreated.

However, the attack of the Golden Slayer Ancient Demon did not cause him much damage, and those damages were all offset by the Space-Time Form Secret Method and the Body-of-Space Ultimate Arcane, which was the pinnacle of the Space-Time Body.

"Sure enough, it's evil!"

The Golden Exterminating Ancient Demon frowned, he didn't hit Ye Tian hard with one blow, according to his original estimate, he could kill Ye Tian with a few moves.

But now, Ye Tian's strength made him a little panicked.

This time, he shouldn't be able to kill Ye Tian, if this is the case, the consequences will be too serious.

Immediately, he cast a forbidden technique, burning the body of the ancient demon to fight, and he had to kill Ye Tian.

And at this time, Ye Tian finally cast his Remnant 0.0 Missing Extreme Dao Ultimate Arcane - Remnant Demon Blade!

A black man's remnant demon blade seemed to have crossed the ultimate body, directly penetrating his body before the Golden Slayer Ancient Demon could react.

Immediately after, the body of the Golden Slayer Ancient Demon began to crack, but in the end, there were only dozens of cracks.

Although it did not fall, the injuries of the Golden Slayer Ancient Demon were not light.

And Ye Tian's body was also counterattacked, and it was not easy.

"You're ......"

The Golden Slayer Ancient Demon was scared, he actually sensed the breath of the Extreme Path Ultimate Arcane, although it was not as good as the real Extreme Path Ultimate Arcane, but at least it was a fragmented version of the Extreme Path Ultimate Arcane.

A top-notch Ancient Demon-level powerhouse actually created this Incomplete Extreme Path Ultimate Arcane.

It's horrible!.
